dj_text: THE PORTAL HAS CONSUMED Wake Me Up Before You Go-Go (Medieval Cover)! IT NOW DEMANDS Kalinka (Medieval Cover)! FEED THE PORTAL! Got a nice little set going. 3 more after this one.
